description:
The diagram illustrates a research-to-knowledge pipeline, flowing horizontally from left to right across six distinct stages. The background is a very light pastel blue, providing a subtle backdrop. Each stage is represented by a rectangular box with rounded corners and a thin, solid dark grey border. Inside each box, text labels are centered and use a clear, sans-serif font. The boxes themselves have a very subtle gradient fill, transitioning from a slightly lighter blue at the top to the base pastel blue at the bottom, giving a sense of depth.

Stage 1, "Discovery," is located on the far left. Inside the box, the text "Discovery" is prominent in bold sans-serif. Below this, in a slightly smaller sans-serif font, is "Monitor Module." Three small, stylized icons representing data sources are arranged horizontally below the "Monitor Module" label: a stack of papers icon (ArXiv), a code snippet icon (Papers With Code), and a graduation cap icon (Semantic Scholar). These icons have a soft, desaturated color palette (e.g., light orange, light teal, light purple, respectively) and are connected to the "Monitor Module" label by dashed grey lines, indicating data sources. An arrow, originating from the right side of the "Discovery" box, points rightward to the next stage.

Stage 2, "Paper Fetch," is directly to the right of "Discovery." The box contains the text "Paper Fetch" in bold sans-serif. Below, in a smaller sans-serif font, is "Agent fetches abstract, PDF, metadata." A downward arrow emerging from this text leads to a smaller rounded rectangle with a soft sage green fill and a slightly darker green border, labeled "Full PDF Text Extraction" in sans-serif, indicating a sub-process. An arrow then continues rightward from the "Paper Fetch" box to the next stage.

Stage 3, "Multi-faceted Extraction," is the central and largest stage. It has the text "Multi-faceted Extraction" at the top in bold sans-serif. Below, are four sub-boxes arranged vertically: "Mathematical Equations (LaTeX → structured JSON)," "Architecture Descriptions (model components, layers, connections)," "Dataset References (name, splits, metrics)," and "Benchmark Numbers (tables → structured data)." Each of these sub-boxes has a very light cream background fill and a thinner dashed grey border. The text within these sub-boxes is in a smaller sans-serif font. Below the four sub-boxes, and still inside the main box, is "Key contributions and novelty claims" in sans-serif. An arrow leads from the right side of the "Multi-faceted Extraction" box to the next stage.

Stage 4, "Spec Generation," is to the right of "Multi-faceted Extraction." It contains the text "Spec Generation" in bold sans-serif. Below this, in a smaller sans-serif font, is "A spec.md file is generated." A small, stylized document icon with a light peach fill is placed to the left of the "spec.md" text. An arrow flows rightward to the next stage.

Stage 5, "Knowledge Graph Indexing," is to the right of "Spec Generation." The box contains the text "Knowledge Graph Indexing" in bold sans-serif. Below the text, it says "Paper nodes, concept nodes, equation nodes added to Obsidian vault" in sans-serif. A small, stylized graph icon with a light lavender fill is placed to the left of the "Knowledge Graph Indexing" text. Below this, is "Edges encode 'uses', 'improves-on', 'cites', 'applies-to' relationships" in sans-serif. An arrow flows rightward to the final stage.

Stage 6, "Weekly Digest," is on the far right. The box contains the text "Weekly Digest" in bold sans-serif. Below, it says "Every Monday, the digest job queries the knowledge graph" in sans-serif. In smaller font is "Ranks by citation count and novelty score, generates Markdown blog post" in sans-serif. A small, stylized calendar icon with a light sky blue fill is placed to the left of "Weekly Digest" text.

All arrows connecting the stages are solid dark grey with a medium thickness and have closed arrowheads indicating the direction of flow. The overall flow is strictly left to right, emphasizing the sequential nature of the pipeline.

critic_suggestions: In Stage 3, "Multi-faceted Extraction," the description mentions four sub-boxes and then an additional text element. It should be clarified whether "Key contributions and novelty claims" is also within a sub-box, or if it's directly within the main box.

In Stage 5, "Knowledge Graph Indexing," the description mentions the graph icon being to the left of the "Knowledge Graph Indexing" text, but it appears to be above the text in the provided image. This should be corrected.
In Stage 6, "Weekly Digest," the description says the calendar icon is to the left of the "Weekly Digest" text, but it appears to be above the text in the provided image. This should be corrected.
